content: {"file": "backend/pipeline/nodes/export_document.py", "summary": "This file contains logic to export a document in .docx format from the approved stories stored in state['approved_stories']. It creates a structured document with headings, lists, and bullet points for each story's details including user stories, acceptance criteria, dev tasks, unit tests, etc. The document is saved under settings.EXPORTS_DIR with a versioned filename.", "rules": [{"name": "_sanitize_filename_part", "description": "Sanitizes a string to be used as part of a file name by replacing non-alphanumeric characters with underscores and removing leading/trailing underscores.", "conditions": ["text: str"], "actions": ["return sanitized text"]}, {"name": "_next_version", "description": "Finds the highest existing version number for a given base filename in EXPORTS_DIR and returns the next version number.", "conditions": ["exports_dir: str", "base_name: str"], "actions": ["return max_version + 1"]}, {"name": "_add_list", "description": "Adds list items to a document as bullet points.", "conditions": ["document: Document", "items: list[str]"], "actions": ["add each item in the list as a paragraph with 'List Bullet' style"]}, {"name": "_add_dict_or_list", "description": "Adds dictionary or list data to a document, handling both types by iterating and adding items.", "conditions": ["document: Document", "value: dict | list"], "actions": ["if value is dict, add key-value pairs as bullet points; if value is list, call _add_list"]}, {"name": "_add_story", "description": "Adds a story's details to the document including user stories, acceptance criteria, dev tasks, unit tests, etc.", "conditions": ["document: Document", "story: dict"], "actions": ["add headings and content for each section of the story"]}, {"name": "export_document_node", "description": "Asynchronously renders state['approved_stories'] to a .docx file under settings.EXPORTS_DIR, handling errors gracefully.", "conditions": ["state: StoryForgeState"], "actions": ["create document, add content, save with versioned filename, update state with path and error status"]}], "dependencies": ["config.settings", "pipeline.state.StoryForgeState", "docx.Document", "docx.shared.Pt", "os.makedirs", "re.sub"]}
